untranslatable_reason: Signal requires bid/ask spread tracking and detection of alternating bid-ask price jumps (microstructure-level data). No allowed indicators directly measure spread components, transitory spread widening, or bid/ask jump directionality. The 'consecutive alternating jumps' and 'distance from midpoint in spreads' conditions require order-flow microstructure data unavailable in the standard OHLCV indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used pivot as midpoint reference, volume below vol_ratio_20 as low-volume proxy, and ATR elevation as transitory volatility signal. However, this does NOT capture the core bid/ask bounce mechanic or mean reversion to true midpoint. A proper implementation requires Level 2 order book data or bid/ask tick data.
